options.text: No problem, I know how much you wanted it.
I'm sorry, I can't help you with that.
You should have asked someone else.
It cost me a lot of money.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的感谢，并表达了理解对方的需求，语气自然真诚。干扰项要么拒绝帮助（与语境矛盾），要么推卸责任，或强调金钱成本，不符合朋友间帮助的轻松语境。
content.speakerText: How did you even find that out-of-print book? Thanks so much!
content.speakerTextCn: 你怎么找到这本绝版书的？太感谢了！

options.text: Pay me back with coffee next week!
I need you to return it by Friday.
You should buy me a new book.
Don't worry about it, I'm getting paid.

content.explanation: 正确答案以轻松幽默的方式化解人情债压力，符合朋友间互动的语境。干扰项要么变成强制要求（不自然），要么暗示金钱交易（违背友谊语境），或完全不合逻辑。
content.speakerText: I owe you one for this!

options.text: It was a breeze—I'm just glad you're happy!
Yeah, it was a lot of work, so you owe me.
Maybe you should ask the library next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案用口语化表达（a breeze）表达谦逊并强调对方的喜悦，自然真诚。干扰项中，第二项要求回报显得功利，第三项推卸责任，第四项虽然谦虚但语气过于冷淡，缺乏情感回应。
content.speakerText: I really appreciate you going out of your way to find this rare edition for me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激你特意为我找到这本稀有版本。
